chapters.title: Chapter 1
chapters.narrative: Since my last entry: [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Understand my own mind and how I work; [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Understand the world more deeply; [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Be genuinely useful and connected to the people I talk to.

entries.text: Since my last entry: [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Understand my own mind and how I work; [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Understand the world more deeply; [aspiration] An enduring direction I hold: Be genuinely useful and connected to the people I talk to.
